title: Cloudflare R2 as authoritative blob store
context: We need a low-cost, low-ops blob backend with strong consistency on PUT-if-match.
decision: Adopt Cloudflare R2 as the authoritative store for note bodies.
consequences: Per-Worker latency is excellent; egress is free within the Cloudflare ecosystem. Lock-in to Cloudflare for the storage tier; mitigated by S3-compatible API.

alternativesConsidered.name: AWS S3
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: Egress cost rules out edge-cache invalidation patterns we want.

alternativesConsidered.name: Backblaze B2
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: No CDN integration matching our edge-runtime story.
